chapter_title.en: Chapter 192 – The seeking of Forgiveness from the sins

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (1/310)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (1/310)
text: لِكُلِّ شَيْ‏ءٍ دَوَاءٌ وَ دَوَاءُ الذُّنُوبِ الِاسْتِغْفَارُ .

en.hubeali: From him, from a number of our companions, raising it, saying,
‘He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘For everything there is a cure, and a cure for the sins is the seeking of Forgiveness’.
en.sarwar: 8. It is narrated from him (narrator of the Hadith above) from a number of our people in a marfu’ manner from him (a.s.) who has said the following: “For everything there is a medicine and the medicine for sins is pleading (before Allah) for forgiveness.”
